title: centaurea nemenyiana
intro: Centaurea nemenyiana, also known as Nemeny's knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Centaurea nemenyiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used as a tincture, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
